{{Quote|It is not in anger that I ask you to take me, though controlling my fury is something I will have to learn. Take me because I feel the thing you call the Force. Take me because I will pledge myself to the peace and knowledge of the Jedi, and to the use of the Force not in anger, but only in defense.|Sannah asks to be trained as a Jedi|<ref name="Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World">''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]''</ref>}}
'''Sannah''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Melodie]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] from [[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]].

==Biography==
In [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], Sannah was saved by the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] trainees [[Anakin Solo]] and [[Tahiri Veila]] during a trip to the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]] to escort [[Lyric]], a [[Melodie]] who was to undergo an important [[Changing Ceremony|form-changing ceremony]]. Sannah was discovered by the pair to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] after she fought a [[Raith (rodent)|raith]]. Back at the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], she was accepted as a trainee by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. Sannah also taught Anakin and Tahiri how to read [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] inscriptions and break the curse of the [[Golden Globe]].

Sannah became a cadet of the [[New Jedi Order]] and trained alongside [[Valin Horn]]. Along with Valin, she stayed behind in the [[Great Temple/Legends|Great Temple]] with Anakin Solo, Tahiri Veila and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Ikrit]] to fight off the [[Peace Brigade]], much to Anakin's chagrin. While trying to escape Yavin 4, Sannah laughed when Valin caused a group of [[Insect/Legends|insects]] to attack [[Remis Vehn]], forcing Anakin to chastise them for their actions. Sannah later went on to survive the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] and was present on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] when Luke Skywalker [[Conclave on Zonama Sekot|called all Jedi there]].
